case_title: BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. TONYA D WILLIAMS

docket_entries.description: REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON MAY-26-2026.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $15.55 FILED BY BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, TONYA D ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-08-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT. 8, 2010. NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF(S) AND NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. COMM. PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA, NOT REPORTED. (506)
